vocab.example: Being a bit of a bibliophile, I have a dedicated room in my house just for my ever-growing collection.
Reading fiction allows me to nurture a vivid imagination, as I can visualize every scene in my mind.

vocab.meaning: một câu chuyện/lối kể chuyện lôi cuốn
vocab.example: I am particularly drawn to historical non-fiction that features a compelling narrative rather than just dry facts.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò về trí tuệ/ham học hỏi
vocab.example: Reading is my primary outlet for intellectual curiosity, helping me stay informed about global affairs.

vocab.meaning: gợi suy nghĩ/khiến người ta phải suy ngẫm
vocab.example: I enjoy essays that are thought-provoking and challenge my existing worldview.

vocab.meaning: đưa ai đó đến (một thế giới khác/nơi khác)
vocab.example: A well-written travelogue has the power to transport me to distant lands without me ever leaving my armchair.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn sau một ngày dài
vocab.example: There is no better way to unwind after a long day at work than to curl up with a good book.
Books provide a wealth of knowledge on niche subjects that you rarely find in mainstream media.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm/mải mê vào cái gì
vocab.example: I often lose myself in the intricate subplots of classic Russian literature for hours on end.

vocab.meaning: đồng cảm với các nhân vật
vocab.example: Reading helps me develop emotional intelligence as I learn to empathize with characters from diverse backgrounds.
